positive: A minimalist line art design of abstract celestial bodies and constellations. Clean, modern, negative space composition, delicate single-line drawing style, deep indigo and gold accents, highly stylized, perfect for engraving or embroidery.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, color clutter, gradients, shading, filled areas, realism
